name: atlas
description: Atlas is a self-configuring multi-agent coding architect. The /atlas command and a SessionStart boot load and wire the whole runtime automatically: the atlas-engine methodology (research -> theory -> test -> validate -> implement -> verify, evidence before any done claim), an 18-agent subagent squad (atlas:explorer, atlas:implementer, atlas:verifier, atlas:planner, atlas:db-prober, atlas:ui-runtime-tester, the five-agent UI/UX test swarm, and the docs curators/auditors), seven auto-loaded automation hooks, and a library of verification-gated /atlas-* launcher commands (feature, frontend, component, debug, refactor, readme, gitignore, handoff, db-audit, grafana, m365, vendor-assessment, harden, prompt, validate) that all share one neutral operating contract. Atlas integrates claude-mem and context-mode (recommend then confirm), discovers and recommends the skills/plugins/MCP a project needs, and improves itself over time: a self-improvement nudge captures lessons to memory and committed .agents/ notes so the next session starts ahead.
